name: KMID
description: This factor measures the relative difference between close and open price within a day, indicating intraday price movement direction.

name: KLEN
description: This factor measures the intraday trading range (high and low) relative to the open price, capturing volatility within a day.

name: KMID2
description: This factor measures the position of the close price within the day's high-low range relative to the open price. (Handle high=low case)

name: KUP
description: This factor captures the distance from the higher value by Greater(open, close) to the high price, relative to the open price.

name: KUP2
description: This factor measures the upper shadow length relative to the day's range, based on the higher value of Greater(open, close). (Handle high=low case)

name: KLOW
description: This factor captures the distance from the smaller value by Less(open, close) to the low price, relative to the open price.

name: KLOW2
description: This factor measures the lower shadow length by Less(open, close) relative to the day's range, based on the lower of open or close. (Handle high=low case)

name: KSFT
description: This factor reflects the relative position of the close price between the high and low, normalized by the open price.

name: KSFT2
description: This factor represents the symmetry of the close price within the high-low range of the day. (Handle high=low case)
